frames.text: 3 de la manana, todos menos Stick
un video mas, manana cumplo el plan
el cuerpo se arregla por dentro
cuando duerme bien, su cuerpo trabaja
si no duerme, la basura se queda
cose lo roto, cuida la punta del cordon
la punta de plastico del cordon
tu equipo quiere entrar, dejalo pasar
que habito alarga la vida? like

images.scene: Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on a light background, red is the ONLY color (the character's round glasses). SCENE: the muscular good-looking doodle stickman 'Stick' (long hair, headband, round red glasses) lying awake in bed at night, a glowing phone lighting his red glasses, a nightstand clock reading 3:00, a window showing a sleeping city skyline with a moon. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on a light background, red is the ONLY color (the round glasses). SCENE: close-up of 'Stick' (muscular doodle stickman) face at night lit by a phone glow from below, clearly showing his long hair, headband and round red glasses. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, red is the ONLY color (round glasses). SCENE: 'Stick' (muscular doodle stickman, long hair, headband, red glasses) sitting up in bed at night holding a glowing phone, looking slightly uneasy as he glances at a strand of his own hair. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, red is the ONLY color (round glasses). SCENE: extreme close-up of 'Stick' looking shocked and pointing at a single GRAY hair standing out among his dark long hair, eyes wide, headband and round red glasses. One single gray hair. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, red is the ONLY color (round glasses). SCENE: 'Stick' (muscular doodle stickman, long hair, headband, red glasses) sleeping peacefully in bed, with a floating wrench-and-gear 'maintenance' icon above him, calm night, small moon. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, a few small red accents. SCENE: cross-section of 'Stick's sleeping muscular body, with several tiny stick-figure repair workers inside fixing and tightening little gears and bolts. Conceptual 'the body repairs itself during sleep'. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, a few small red accents. SCENE: split image — on the left 'Stick' sleeping soundly in bed; on the right his body shown 'at work' with big turning gears. Conceptual. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, a few small red accents. SCENE: a large human head cross-section at night, a crew of tiny stick-figure janitors with brooms ENTERING the brain to clean it, moon and Zzz. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, a few small red accents. SCENE: tiny stick-figure janitors carrying little trash bags OUT of an opening in a human head, sweeping the brain clean. Conceptual. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, a few small red accents. SCENE: tiny stick-figure janitors locked OUTSIDE a closed door on a human head (a small 'no entry' sign), while trash piles up inside the head. Conceptual. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, a few small red accents. SCENE: two simple batteries charging with little energy glow lines, next to a growing pile of trash bags. Conceptual 'batteries recharge during sleep'. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, a few small red accents. SCENE: a needle and thread sewing/stitching a simple muscle shape, and beside it a shoelace with its tip highlighted. Conceptual 'the body repairs itself'. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, a touch of red. SCENE: a big clear close-up of a shoelace end with its plastic tip (aglet) highlighted, the rest of the lace trailing off. Minimalist. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, a touch of red. SCENE: a simple round cell with a protective shoelace-like tip on its end, shown getting shorter, an arrow pointing to a slightly older hunched stick figure. Conceptual telomeres. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, red is the only color (glasses + alarm). SCENE: 'Stick' (muscular doodle stickman, long hair, headband, red glasses) lying awake in bed exhausted, with a red alarm bell ringing loudly above his head. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, red accent on the alarm. SCENE: a ringing red fire-alarm bell with a small stressed face on it; a small sun on one side and a moon on the other to suggest day vs night. Conceptual cortisol/stress alarm. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, red accents. SCENE: 'Stick' at night, a red alarm bell still ringing inside his chest and a small flame starting to burn inside him. Conceptual 'the alarm never shuts off, a fire starts'. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, red accents. SCENE: a small slow fire smoldering with wisps of smoke inside a simple body silhouette, with little rust/oxidation spots appearing. Conceptual 'slow inflammation oxidizing the body'. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, red accent. SCENE: a shoelace fraying badly at its tip on one side, and on the other side 'Stick' (long hair, headband, red glasses) with several new gray hairs appearing, looking worried. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, red accent (glasses). SCENE: 'Stick' shown split in two — young and energetic on the left, prematurely old and hunched with gray hair on the right — and a hand pointing a finger toward the viewer. Conceptual 'this happens to you too'. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, red accent. SCENE: an ordinary everyman stick figure (the viewer) lying awake in bed at night, a faint red alarm glow inside the chest. Relatable 'this is you tonight'. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, red accent. SCENE: a human head with trash left uncleaned inside the brain, next to a calendar/clock marked '+10' suggesting ten years later. Conceptual. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, red accent (glasses). SCENE: 'Stick' (long hair, headband, red glasses) sleeping deeply and peacefully in bed with a content smile, a big calm moon and soft Zzz. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, red accent (glasses). SCENE: 'Stick' (long hair, headband, red glasses) talking with a doctor stick-figure wearing a white coat and a stethoscope. Friendly, reassuring. Conceptual 'talk to a professional'. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, a few red accents. SCENE: a friendly crew of tiny stick-figure janitors being welcomed through an OPEN door into a human head, smiling. Conceptual 'let the cleaning crew in'. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, red accent (glasses). SCENE: 'Stick' (long hair, headband, red glasses) happily putting his phone face-down on the nightstand and lying down to sleep, content. No text.

Doodle stickman art style, thick black marker lines on white, red accent (glasses). SCENE: 'Stick' (muscular, long hair, headband, red glasses) giving a confident thumbs up next to a big 'like' thumb icon and an arrow pointing right to a 'next video' rectangle. End-card vibe. No text.
